content.en:
"Survived!"

The True Martial Palace Lord breathed a sigh of relief.

The Vermilion Bird Palace Lord and the Blue Dragon Palace Lord also relaxed, and the injuries of the two of them were not light, they could be regarded as serious injuries.

If it drags on any longer, all three of them are in danger of falling, because the gap between the two sides is too big.

"The strength of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor is second only to the Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, I'm afraid that even the real Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor may not be able to kill him, it must be the top Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor to be able to kill him!"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord sighed.

Wow!

A figure appeared, and it was the Dragon Shadow Palace Master.

"Are you alright?"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord asked.

"It's okay, it's just that the Starry Sky Palace Lord and the Heavenly Wolf Palace Lord have fallen!" said the Blue Dragon Palace Lord with emotion.

"This matter will be settled slowly in the future, this time in order to let the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors not kill you, our Heavenly Emperor Palace has paid a lot of price, but as long as you don't fall, it will be worth it!" said the Dragon Shadow Palace master.

Immediately, the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord left with the Blue Dragon Palace Master and returned to the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

The other side.

Ye Tian was summoned back to the Wind Mountain, and here, he met the Wind Mountain Lord.

The Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain was a young man who looked very young, and he looked very kind, but there was a resolute aura between his eyebrows.

"I've seen the Mountain Lord!"

Ye Tian bent down and arched his hand.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors, you are very good, you are invincible Dao Ancestor Realm against the five Half-Step Domain Ancestors, and you have also killed two Half-Step Domain Ancestors, your combat power is second only to the Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors, such a talent has never even been seen before!" the Wind Mountain Lord praised.

"Thank you for the compliment!"

Ye Tian said indifferently.

"This is the compensation given to you by the Heavenly Emperor Palace!" The Wind Mountain Lord handed Ye Tian the resources he had extorted from the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord.

After Ye Tian received it, he checked it a little and was immediately overjoyed.

These are all things from the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle, the value is too high, it is almost difficult to get, and even no one trades inside the Black Wind Mountain, and it cannot be exchanged for points, because the blood, bones, and scales of the forbidden bloodline creatures are all real treasures, consumable treasures, and no one lacks them.

"Let's practice well!"

The main road of Fengshan Mountain.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded, and immediately retreated.

......

Ye Tian's body has always been in the human world, and what came out was just a copy of the body, so the copy body was not afraid of being attacked again, he did not return to the human world, nor did he lift it, and he went to find Ouyang Jiu'er.

After contacting Ouyang Jiu'er, Ye Tian quickly met her.

"Jiu'er!"

Ye Tian shouted.

Ouyang Jiu'er immediately said, "Brother Ye, thank you for not killing the True Martial Palace Master!"

She knew very well that if Ye Tian killed the True Martial Palace Master, the True Martial Palace Master would definitely not survive.

At the same time, she was also very shocked that Ye Tian's combat power was so strong, much stronger than her now.

In fact, she is also very powerful, but she can't cultivate the Forbidden Dao Technique to the Dacheng realm, and in her previous life, she only cultivated the Forbidden Dao Technique to the Xiaocheng realm.

The gap between the Forbidden Dao Technique Dacheng and the Xiaocheng is incomparably large, and it is simply a world of difference.

Moreover, Ye Tian's Dao was far stronger than her Dao, and her potential and limit were stronger than her, so as soon as Ye Tian broke through to the Invincible Dao Ancestor level, his combat power was extremely terrifying.

Now, Ouyang Jiu'er knew that he was at most competing with the weaker half-step domain ancestor, and this kind of combat power was really not enough.

Moreover, at her current level, the accumulation of her previous life has been completely exhausted, and her progress will be very slow in the future.

"Jiu'er, why did you ask me not to kill the True Martial Palace Master?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"The True Martial Palace Master is my eyeliner!" Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"Sure enough!"

Ye Tian had actually guessed this, because Ouyang Jiu'er was very aware of the information of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and the source of the information must have come from a certain half-step domain ancestor, this time Ouyang Jiu'er asked him not to kill the True Martial Palace Master, he could naturally guess it.

"Jiu'er, the True Martial Palace Master should be the relatively old half-step domain ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, why would he betray the Heavenly Emperor Palace and give you a message?" Ye Tian was very puzzled by this.

"Actually, the True Martial Palace Lord did not betray the Heavenly Emperor Palace, because I am also a member of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and it should be said that I was a member of the Heavenly Emperor Palace in the past!"

Ouyang Jiu'er sighed.

"What!"

Ye Tian was shocked, this news was too amazing!

Ouyang Jiu'er turned out to be a member of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, but Ouyang Jiu'er had been targeting the Heavenly Emperor Palace before!

For example, robbing the Guangling Han Palace of the Guangling Emperor, and killing the Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, these things, Ouyang Jiu'er does not look like a person from the Heavenly Emperor Palace at all!

As Ouyang Jiu'er slowly narrated, Ye Tian gradually learned the truth of the matter.

It turned out that Ouyang Jiu'er was a very old half-step domain ancestor in his previous life, he was the Lord of the Cold Moon Palace of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, he was in charge of the Cold Moon Palace, and he was also the daughter of the first Heavenly Emperor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

It can be said that Ouyang Jiu'er was already there in the early days of the establishment of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

It's just that at that time, her talent was not high, and she didn't like cultivation very much, so her strength was not strong, and later she cultivated to the realm of a half-step domain ancestor with the full assistance of the first Heavenly Emperor, but she was only the weakest half-step domain ancestor.

But her identity is different, she is the son of the Emperor of Heaven Palace, how high her status is!

The first Heavenly Emperor was not a domain ancestor, he was a half-step domain ancestor of the One Realm, but he was also a member of a powerful legendary-level force from the Divine Heaven Realm, so the foundation of the Heavenly Emperor Palace was very strong.

It's a pity that in a competition for chance, the first Heavenly Emperor fell.

Originally, the position of the Heavenly Emperor was supposed to be succeeded by one of Ouyang Jiu'er's brothers, but later the Vast Sea Ancestor ordered people to ambush the son of the Heavenly Emperor and kill the son of the Heavenly Emperor, who was already at the half-step domain ancestor level of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, and became the second Heavenly Emperor.

obtained the resources and heritage of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, coupled with the fact that the talent of the Vast Sea Ancestor was still above the first Heavenly Emperor, and successfully snatched the position of the Realm Lord of the Vast Sea Realm, so he was successfully promoted to the Domain Ancestor.

And Ouyang Jiu'er has never dared to return to the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and has been hunted down and killed by the people of the Vast Sea Ancestor.

The palace master who was loyal to the first Heavenly Emperor fell more or less because of something in the future, and the later palace masters were all people from the ancestors of the vast sea.

And the Zhenwu Palace Master is different, he is a palace master who came up from the bottom, and the Vast Sea Ancestor doesn't know that the Zhenwu Palace Master is Ouyang Jiu'er's subordinate, so he has always reused him.

The True Martial Palace Master is also good at hiding and has never revealed his identity.

A long time ago, Ouyang Jiu'er knew that he had no way to take revenge, so he found a reincarnation treasure and reincarnated in the vast sea realm.

But I never expected that before I could grow up, the Domain Realm Shattering War broke out, and the entire Domain Realm was shattered.

"Brother Ye, this is my biggest secret!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said.
